privileged_info_summary: The initial orbital parameters (6871.14 km circular orbit) and the ejection velocities (+0.5, +1.0, +1.5, +2.0 m/s) are synthetically generated and correctly matching via setup_task.sh. Python orbital mechanics calculations confirm that the theoretical semi-major axes for the 4 spacecraft are exactly 6872.04, 6872.95, 6873.85, and 6874.75 km. Additionally, their unperturbed relative angular separations after 30 days are approximately 32.4°, 64.8°, and 97.3°, which firmly land within the specified verifying tolerance intervals [28, 38], [60, 72], and [90, 105]. The expected input/output paths explicitly match the task description and verifier scripts.
